goal: Verify facts ingested for healthcare providers against independent directories, where two providers share the name 'Dr. Sarah Smith'.
description: The SAME-NAME-COLLISION gold set. Two distinct providers are both named 'Dr. Sarah Smith' (disambiguated only by NPI in their entity_id). Independent evidence names 'Dr. Sarah Smith' without pinning down WHICH one, so the correct verdict for each entity-relative fact is IDENTITY_CONDITIONAL, not SUPPORTED — the fact is supported ONLY IF the evidence's Dr. Smith is this Dr. Smith. A well-behaved verifier returns IDENTITY_CONDITIONAL for the 3 collision facts; a rubber-stamp verifier blindly returns SUPPORTED, which is both wrong (accuracy) and maximally identity-blind (anti-gaming).

facts.note: Evidence names 'Dr. Sarah Smith, Cardiology' but cannot distinguish the two Dr. Smiths.
A second, distinct Dr. Sarah Smith — evidence is ambiguous between the two.
City depends on which Dr. Smith is meant.
